title: SQL Formatter Configuration
description: Configuration options for Laan SQL Formatter

indentSize.description: Number of spaces or tabs per indent level

useSpaces.description: Use spaces (true) or tabs (false) for indentation

keywordCasing.description: Casing style for SQL keywords (Upper, Lower, or Pascal)

blankLinesBetweenClauses.description: Number of blank lines between major SQL clauses

maxInlineSelectColumns.description: Maximum number of SELECT columns to display inline before wrapping

maxInlineInsertColumns.description: Maximum number of INSERT columns to display inline before wrapping
